title: 01_problem
description: Output of the triz-problem-framer subagent. Captures the structured contradiction and routing signals used by every downstream stage.

improving_concept.description: Free-text description of the attribute being improved. Not yet mapped to any matrix's parameter set.

worsening_concept.description: Free-text description of the attribute that worsens as a side effect of the improvement.

domain_signals.description: Tags from selector_tags_vocabulary.json:domain_signals describing the problem's domain.

constraints.description: User-supplied constraints on acceptable solutions. May be empty. Appended to by the fatal-severity reformulate_with_constraint flow.

rationale.description: Optional brief rationale from the framer.
